title: Smoky Gooey Greek Turkish Delight Stir-fry
description: A gooey, crowd-pleasing Greek dish featuring smoky flavors and the texture of Turkish delight, simmered to perfection for a simple yet delightful side or snack.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together the Greeks Delight, Sweet Chilli Sauce, Ketchup, Brown Sugar, Garlic Powder, Black Pepper, and Lemon Juice. Stir until well combined.
Heat 1 tablespoon of Olive Oil in a pan over medium heat. Pour the mixture into the pan and stir continuously for about 2 minutes to prevent burning.
Reduce heat to low and let it simmer for another 5-7 minutes or until the Greeks Delight has absorbed most of the sauce and is gooey.
Serve hot as a snack with extra Olive Oil if desired.
